apps.name: Music
apps.author: Vincent Ilagan
apps.summary: Music player — playlists, library and album art.
apps.description: Play your music library on Luci OS with playlists and album art.

apps.name: NodeBase
apps.author: Vincent Ilagan
apps.summary: Node-based visual builder for Luci apps and flows.
apps.description: Design apps and automations by connecting nodes on a canvas — no code required. Built for Luci OS.

apps.name: Notes
apps.author: Lucy
apps.summary: A clean notepad and code scratchpad.
apps.description: Write notes, edit text and code with a distraction-free editor.

apps.name: Pixel
apps.author: Lucy
apps.summary: Fast image viewer and light editor.
apps.description: Open, preview, crop and tweak images natively in Luci OS.

apps.name: Video
apps.author: Vincent Ilagan
apps.summary: Video player — plays every format via mpv.
apps.description: Watch videos on Luci OS with a clean player backed by mpv.
